name: io.github.buluesky/lanhu-design-mcp
description: Read Lanhu design specs and export fine-grained UI assets with platform-adjusted units

environmentVariables.name: LANHU_COOKIE_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a file containing the Lanhu cookie header

environmentVariables.name: LANHU_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: Lanhu cookie header (managed automatic login is preferred)

environmentVariables.name: AUTO_BROWSER_COOKIES
environmentVariables.description: Legacy fallback: attempt to read Lanhu cookies from the default browser database

environmentVariables.name: DDS_COOKIE_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a file containing the DDS cookie header

environmentVariables.name: DDS_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: DDS cookie header (defaults to the resolved Lanhu cookie)
